titleStmt.title: SII 41.79: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 79. (A.R. No. 78 of 1905.) Sōḻavandāṉ, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Janakanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ temple at Sōḻavandāṉ.

summary.p: The trustees of the Śanaka-nārāyaṇa-perumāḷ temple received some money endowment from one Ayyāvayyaṅgār for feeding in the Rāmānuja-kūḍam in the temple. The money was to be invested in some temple land and the income from the land was to be used for the feeding.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu Etattrailokyanirmmāṇatrāṇa samhāra kāraṇam . [janakanārāya]
ṇākhyasyabhratyā vargasya śāsanam . svastiśrī śakābtam 1000 5 100 4tiṉmEl celalā ni
ṉṟa kīlakasamvastarattu dakṣiṇāyanattu krattikā māsattu pūrvapakṣattusaptamiyum
bhraguvāsaramumpramdhiyogamumgarijākaraṇam peṟṟa śravaṇa nakṣatrattunā
ḷ śanaka nārāyaṇa perumāḷ kovil śrīkāryattukkuk kaṭavarom Āsāranayinār Ayyaṅkār A
yyāvayyaṅkārukku dharmmaśāsanap paṭṭayaṅ kuṭuttapaṭi tam muṭaiya śiṣyan cempaṟkum nayināmuta
liyār rā[mānu]ja dāsanpuṇyamāka dvādaśirāmānuja kūṭattukkuppoliyūṭṭak kaṭṭaḷai nilattukku vipara
m perumāḷ tiruviḷaiyāṭṭa mūṅkilaṭikku Ōṭai nilamāvatu colai kuṟuvākku vaṭakku pāṟtta kiḻakku pārtta
yiruppukku meṟku mūṅkilaṭikku meṟku yinta nāṅku yellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nilam tamakku Upakṣaya dhārāpūrvamāka vi
ṟṟu #*10 2 Ikkuyin=tappoṉ panniraṇṭaraiyum nācciyār koyil tiruppaṇikkupayaṅkoṇṭapaṭi
yiṉālē yinnilam nāṅkellaiyu muḷpattāme kaiyyāṇṭu koṇṭu Ipperumāḷ koyilile dvādaśi
dvādaśitoṟum tirunāma deśāndiriyaḷ tadiyyārādhanamāka Amutump paṇṇikkoṇṭu candrā
dittyavaraiyyum putrapautrap paramparaiyāka Anubhavittu koḷḷak kaṭavarākavum yippaṭik kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom
Ayyavayyaṅkārukku perumāḷ śrībhaṇṭāra kāryattukkuṭaiyarom dā pālayormmaddhyeFew letters are lost at the end.
Digital edition of SII 41.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
